prompts.p_listen: 1. Tap and listen. Repeat out loud! / ¡Toca, escucha y repite!
prompts.p_echo: Your turn to speak! Say it loud and clear. / ¡Di la palabra fuerte y claro!
prompts.p_think: 💡 Think in English! How do you say this?
prompts.p_drag: Build the sentence correctly! / ¡Construye la oración:
prompts.p_match: 🧩 Speed Challenge! Match the pairs. / ¡Une los pares rápido!
prompts.p_speak_fast: 🗣️ Speak like a native. Translate and say it fast! / Traduce y dilo rápido:
prompts.p_ready: 🔥 Welcome to The Bonfire — no translations, listen to Moon and respond. Say this to begin:

s_match.en: You're a master at connecting concepts!
